semantic_domains.name: Divinity
semantic_domains.description: God's names, attributes, and divine nature

semantic_domains.name: Law
semantic_domains.description: Divine law, commandments, permissible and forbidden

iconic_verses.text: Say, "I worship only my Lord; I never set up any idols beside Him."
The people used to be one community when GOD sent the prophets as bearers of good news, as well as warners. He sent down with them the scripture, bearing the tr
Absolutely, to GOD belongs everything in the heavens and the earth. He fully knows every condition you may be in. The day you are returned to Him, He will infor
And who never set up any idols beside their Lord,
He knows everything in the heavens and the earth, and He knows everything you conceal and everything you declare. GOD is fully aware of the innermost thoughts.
Say, "Whether you conceal your innermost thought, or declare it, GOD is fully aware thereof." He is fully aware of everything in the heavens and the earth. GOD
"He is fully aware of your public utterances, and He is fully aware of everything you conceal.
They will say, "We did not observe the contact prayers (Salat).
The day will come when He calls upon them, saying, "Where are those idols you had set up beside Me?"
Who always observe their contact prayers (Salat).
If they believe and lead a righteous life, the reward from GOD is far better, if they only knew.
And they observe their Contact Prayers (Salat) regularly.
a messenger who recites to you GOD's revelations, clearly, to lead those who believe and work righteousness out of the darkness into the light. Anyone who belie
GOD is fully aware of them.
"As for the idols you set up beside Him, they cannot help you, nor can they help themselves."
He is the Living; there is no god except He. You shall worship Him alone, devoting your religion absolutely to Him alone. Praise be to GOD, Lord of the universe
They are those who believe and lead a righteous life.
This Quran guides to the best path, and brings good news to the believers who lead a righteous life, that they have deserved a great recompense.
Those who disbelieve would say, "If only a miracle could come down to him from his Lord (we would believe)." Say, "GOD sends astray whomever He wills, and guide
And when those who committed idol worship see their idols, they will say, "Our Lord, these are the idols we had set up beside You." The idols will then confront
Your Lord knows that you meditate during two-thirds of the night, or half of it, or one-third of it, and so do some of those who believed with you. GOD has desi
As for the idols they set up beside GOD, they do not create anything; they themselves were created.
He said, "I will implore my Lord to forgive you; He is the Forgiver, Most Merciful."
" `It guides to righteousness, and we have believed in it; we will never set up any idols beside our Lord.
As for those who believed and led a righteous life, they receive a recompense that is well-deserved.
Yet, they set up beside GOD idols from among the jinns, though He is the One who created them. They even attribute to Him sons and daughters, without any knowle
Your Lord is fully aware of those who stray off His path, and He is fully aware of those who are guided.
They observe the Contact Prayers (Salat), and from our provisions to them, they give to charity.
Those who believe and lead a righteous life, we will certainly admit them with the righteous.
O you messengers, eat from the good provisions, and work righteousness. I am fully aware of everything you do.
We guided them in the right path.
He is the One who sends down from the sky water, whereby we produce all kinds of plants. We produce from the green material multitudes of complex grains, palm t
As for those who disbelieve and reject our revelations, they are the dwellers of Hell.
What did He create him from?
To Him belongs all supremacy in the heavens and the earth. He is the Almighty, Most Wise.
Those who believe and lead a righteous life, and observe the Contact Prayers (Salat), and give the obligatory charity (Zakat), they receive their recompense fro
Glorifying GOD is everything in the heavens and everything on earth. To Him belongs all kingship, and to Him belongs all praise, and He is Omnipotent.
You shall observe the Contact Prayers (Salat) and give the obligatory charity (Zakat), and obey the messenger, that you may attain mercy.
To GOD belongs everything in the heavens and everything on earth, and all matters are controlled by GOD.
As for those who believe and lead a righteous life, they receive a well deserved recompense.
Those who disbelieved can never be helped by their money or their children against GOD. They have incurred Hell, wherein they abide forever.
Your Lord is fully aware of those who strayed off His path, and He is fully aware of those who are guided.
Righteousness is not turning your faces towards the east or the west. Righteous are those who believe in GOD, the Last Day, the angels, the scripture, and the p
Absolutely, to GOD belongs everything in the heavens and the earth. Absolutely, GOD's promise is truth, but most of them do not know.
Whoever wills shall take heed.
Guide us in the right path;
"What you worship instead of GOD are powerless idols; you have invented a lie." The idols you worship beside GOD do not possess any provisions for you. Therefor
As for those who believe and lead a righteous life, they have deserved the eternal Paradise. Such is their abode, in return for their works.
And we would have guided them in the right path.
It is not your money or your children that bring you closer to us. Only those who believe and lead a righteous life will receive the reward for their works, mul
And woe to those who observe the contact prayers (Salat) -
Whoever works righteousness does so for his own good, and whoever works evil does so to his own detriment. To your Lord you will be returned.
As for those who reject our revelations, and are too arrogant to uphold them, they have incurred Hell, wherein they abide forever.
Every soul will be paid for whatever it did, for He is fully aware of everything they have done.
If they argue with you, then say, "GOD is fully aware of everything you do."
They worship beside GOD idols that possess no power to harm them or benefit them, and they say, "These are our intercessors at GOD!" Say, "Are you informing GOD
For he observed neither the charity, nor the contact prayers (Salat).
The Hereafter is far better for you than this first (life).
"Who commit evil, not good works."
Why do you not take heed?
As for those who observe their Lord, they have deserved gardens with flowing streams; they abide therein forever. Such is the abode given to them by GOD. What G
He said, "How can you give me such good news, when I am so old? Do you still give me this good news?"
We sent to them a messenger from among them, saying, "You shall worship GOD. You have no other god beside Him. Would you not be righteous?"
Once you complete your Contact Prayer (Salat), you shall remember GOD while standing, sitting, or lying down. Once the war is over, you shall observe the Contac
He sends down the angels with the revelations, carrying His commands, to whomever He chooses from among His servants: "You shall preach that there is no other g
GOD has rewarded them for saying this; He will admit them into gardens with flowing streams. They abide therein forever. Such is the reward for the righteous.
Then we revealed to you this scripture, truthfully, confirming previous scriptures, and superseding them. You shall rule among them in accordance with GOD's rev
Did you create it, or did we?
They said, "O our people, we have heard a book that was revealed after Moses, and confirms the previous scriptures. It guides to the truth; to the right path.
Say, "GOD is the only One I worship, devoting my religion absolutely to Him alone.

"This is human made."
"I have made you just for Me.
Never; we created them, and they know from what.

The day will come when He summons you to the Day of Summoning. That is the Day of Mutual Blaming. Anyone who believes in GOD and leads a righteous life, He will
To Him belongs everything in the heavens and everything on earth, and He is the Most High, the Great.
If they turn away, we did not send you as their guardian. Your sole mission is delivering the message. When we shower the human beings with mercy, they become p
As for those who believe, and lead a righteous life, they will be the dwellers of Paradise; they abide in it forever.
